Part 1: Stolen Technology: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Timed 13a

Travel / deliver to Arborea

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Recycle Station in Kritillian.
  2. Travel to Arborea.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock Stolen Technology: Part 2.

Description

Captain, we just recieved information about a raid against the Fanatic stronghold on Arborea. We should investigate who is behind this attack. Maybe they can become our allies?

Completion

We don't know who it was, but they seem to have stolen some sort of valuable technology from the Fanatics. And they left a warp trail leading to Hozar.

Part 2: Stolen Technology: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Timed 16a

Travel / deliver to Melifon

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Melifon.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Stolen Technology: Part 3.

Description

The warp trail leads to Hozar and the planet Melifon. We should prepare for locust spawners, they are extremly nasty and dangerous but weak against Nova charges.

Completion

Pheww...

Never thought we would suceed with that. However, it seems like the trail stops here. It's almost as if they vanished into thin air.

Maybe we should land on the other planets as well to look for clues.

Part 3: Stolen Technology: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Timed 28a

Travel / deliver to Eufelion, Axalon

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Eufelion, Axalon.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Stolen Technology: Part 4.

Description

Land on Eufelion and Axalon to look for clues about those responsbile for the raid on Arborea.

Completion

Captain, we have found something interesting. The three infested planets seem to act as an emitter relay that distort our sensors. However, we found weak signal indicating a hidden station in this system.

We should head for those coordinates.

Part 4: Stolen Technology: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission Timed 34a

Travel / deliver to Pirate Bay

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Pirate Bay.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Find the hidden station in Hozar and look for more clues about the raid.

Head to the coordinates:

x = 35, y = 232

Completion

Space pirates, who would have thought they were holding out here. The station has weapon replicator technology, although it seem to be slightly damaged by our attack. It can replicate any weapon we already posses.

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
